title: What is Personal Responsibility? 8 Key Ingredients
content: What isPersonalResponsibility? When you have a sense ofpersonalresponsibility, it means you are willing to accept and live by society's established standards of individual behavior. When these expected standards aren't met, someone withpersonalresponsibilitydoesn't seek others to blame, rather they're able to maturely respond to the presented challenges themselves and take any ...
